title: XC BirdCLEF 2026 Target Recordings (URLs)
subtitle: XC URL list Q A|B non-ND, 159 Aves species
description: Metadata CSV (URL list + per-recording fields: xc_id, file_url, quality, length_sec, country, license, etc.) for downloading Xeno-Canto audio as external training data for BirdCLEF+ 2026. Raw audio NOT included (license/size). This CSV is derivative metadata only; actual audio remains on xeno-canto.org under original CC licenses.
